rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, 'this is silly' flipped to 'because I want to and it makes me happy,' then did it anyway. That's a round won clean. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed in the men's change room — poncho still on, but the active choice keeps landing. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace stayed home on work days — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading as obviously gay — named clearly, which counts, but the joy police got that one.
pattern: They're losing with strangers and winning with his people — the frontier is exactly where it needs to be.
focus: This week's Internal Work: Wednesday midweek pulse check-in — catch one joy police moment in real time, not after.
